confusion.label: moonstone grey
confusion.prompt_desc: soft pearl-grey shimmer, quietly uncertain. No glow trails.

pause.label: sapphire blue
pause.prompt_desc: deep sapphire blue, single calm glow. Still, not pulsing.

calm.label: emerald green
calm.prompt_desc: steady emerald green, soft inner light. Unhurried.

curiosity.label: topaz gold
curiosity.prompt_desc: warm topaz gold, gentle forward warmth. Not glaring.

fragile_hope.label: diamond white
fragile_hope.prompt_desc: clear diamond-white shimmer, barely visible. Quiet and tender.

growth.label: citrine golden
growth.prompt_desc: warm citrine gold, slow upward radiance. Not bright.

passion.label: ruby red
passion.prompt_desc: deep ruby red, contained fire. Intense but not neon.
